## Category

Which professional category does this annex cover?

## Regulatory landscape

What regulatory framework (or absence of one) applies to this category?

## Why include now

Why should this category be included as matchable now rather than waiting?

## Proposed metadata

- Matching weight profile (regulated / mid-regulation / low-regulation):
- Review weight cap proposed:
- Default pre-handoff check (Stage 2):
- Stage 2 auth tier:

What category-specific compliance requirements apply (HIPAA, attorney-client

## Validator stack

Which trusted partners or verifiers cover this category at launch?

## Discussion thread

Link to the GitHub Discussions thread where this annex was first proposed.
